summary: Iteration 50 - Clarity & Meaning refinement phase testing complete. All 4 improved areas verified: (1) World State Language - field_narrative_he returns symbolic Hebrew sentences without numbers, (2) Opposition Engine - personal tension mirror with 3 arcs (סדר↔כאוס, קולקטיב↔אגו, יציבות↔חקירה) showing glowing position dots and interpretive text, (3) Globe Readability - cleaner header with 'מצב השדה' title, narrative text, dominant direction dot with thin direction bar, reduced clutter, (4) Performance - globe auto-rotate and heartbeat glow working smoothly.
critical_code_review_comments: _generate_field_narrative function correctly generates symbolic Hebrew sentences without numbers
field-dashboard endpoint returns field_narrative_he from live data
GlobalFieldDashboard shows narrative with living pulse dot, no stats
FieldGlobeSection header properly displays 'מצב השדה', narrative, dominant direction dot + thin bar
All 3 tension axes (chaos_order, ego_collective, exploration_stability) render with arcs and interpretive text
EntryLayer uses field_narrative_he for world state narrative instead of stats badges
Direction legend highlights dominant direction, others are dimmed
Globe heartbeat animation timing adjusts based on field activity

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - 1 minor assertion fix needed for compass-ai field name)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 refines clarity and meaning. Key changes: field_narrative_he replaces numeric stats with symbolic Hebrew sentences. Opposition axes (chaos_order, ego_collective, exploration_stability) power the tension mirror.
